title: Meaty Mild Slovakian Rigatoni Pasta
description: A hearty and flavorful Slovakian dish featuring rigatoni pasta, ground meat, and a blend of spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This keto-friendly recipe is a great option for those looking for a low-carb meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rigatoni pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook the ground pork and ground beef over medium-high heat, breaking up the meat with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the paprika, caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the meat and spice mixture.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the pasta and meat mixture for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the meaty rigatoni pasta hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or chives if desired.
Let the dish rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
